import io
import string

fn rot13(_ s: String) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < string.len(s)
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 65 and b <= 90
      let rotated = (b - 65 + 13) % 26 + 65
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(rotated)}"
    else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let rotated = (b - 97 + 13) % 26 + 97
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(rotated)}"
    else
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  println(rot13(line))
end
